scenarios.seed_note: Repo-owned GE preset truth source from demo preset and ETU route tests.
Repo-owned browser contract covers sensor 26 as the secondary ETU sensor with a single 1200A plug and LT-only settings surface.

blocked_requirements.requirement: Add one alternate-plug-family ETU sensor under a different trip_style_id than sensor 25.
blocked_requirements.reason: No trusted repo-owned seed values for a non-trip_style-3 ETU sensor were present locally, and the live discovery prerequisites were unavailable in this shell (APEX_OLARES_LIVE_DSN unset, route 127.0.0.1:8010 unavailable).
